Gold Nugget [Frontier Fool's Gold]  
 


This item can be used in tradeskills.
WT: 0.5 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Gold Nugget [Frontier Fool's Gold]

This item can be used in tradeskills.
WT: 0.5 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Lore:Frontier Fool's Gold
Item Type:Misc
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-18 20:51:36
Page Updated:Wed Nov 16th, 2016

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 1
[Quests | Recipes | Comments ]
This item is found by foraging.

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Cabilis East
Quest Name
Shackle of Bronze
Warrior Pike #3 (Soldier's Pike)
Used in 2 recipes.
Recipe list - Premium only.

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Frontier Mountains
Frontier Mountains [EoK]


Uploaded November 16th, 2016 by Drewinette
Send a correction
Post Comment
Forage
QuoteReply
# Mar 02 2017 at 3:22 PM Rating: Decent
WhowhoOfBertox
11 posts
I was foraging with my monk skill 50 max and 75 bard skill 55 max only pulling up roots, none of the rares. So i brought in my level 100 monk with skill 100. I foraged on all 3 character's. The only one pulling up rare forages was my level 100 skill 100 monk. Took a couple hours of foraging to get the drop. Got 3 regular gold nuggets before the fools gold one
So if your not of a higher skill level you might need a ranger or druid to help you. Good luck!
▲ Page top
Fools Gold
QuoteReply
# Nov 17 2015 at 10:39 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1687133916145
Scholar
18 posts
For those of us that can't use the Identify spell, or don't have a clicky. The correct Gold Nugget reads "This item can be used in tradeskills" in its discription, but are otherwise identical to the false one. This way you don't have to see if the one you spent forever foraging is sellable or not. So you are welcome monks =p
▲ Page top
Gold Nugget
QuoteReply
# Apr 30 2014 at 10:29 PM Rating: Excellent
Sheldor
Guru
174 posts
There are 2 types, same name. One is sellable for 4s8c, no notes attached to it. The other is not sellable, but says item can be used for tradeskills.
▲ Page top
Confirmed type
QuoteReply
# Aug 03 2004 at 5:39 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1618791502835
View User Forum
Guru
400 posts
Greetings,

Foraged 3 of these in Frontier Mtns today - I can confirm that the non-saleable one, which is the one required for the Iksar Monk quest, is the one with the tradeskill tag.

Just hoping to save someone else the long run from FM to the nearest iksar-friendly vendor!

Hope this helps
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 30 2004 at 5:49 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) You know some jerk just came up with that idea. They found it in their hearts to give iksars a source of food with the innate 50 skill and cap in foraging and some guy comes along and says, "Hey, they can forage so why not give them rare items to forage that are suppose to be part of the iksar epics when we later come to our senses and give iksar access to real epics like everyone."
the 2 golds
QuoteReply
# Oct 22 2003 at 2:25 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361927303
161 posts
ok on the one that "can be used in trade skill" I got Item Lore: Frontier fool's Gold. the other one I have seen I could not identy it, and I think you just sell that one (being real gold) to vendor for money.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 04 2002 at 3:10 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post)
New Gold Nugget?
QuoteReply
# May 20 2002 at 4:51 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591779035033
7 posts
I just finished a GM event where two rogues, Harlen Squatter and Morchid Jumper, dropped Gold Nuggets. Now the character starting the quest/roleplay was Aksor Minor. This does not seem to fit in with any of the posts below either. Any Ideas?
▲ Page top
THE QUEST
QuoteReply
# Jun 17 2001 at 3:12 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1634516295682
Scholar
94 posts
there are 2 types of gold nuggets foraged in FM. one can be sold and the important one that is not able to be sold
The important one is for the Shackle of Bronze quest for Iksar Monks. it will identify as frontier fools gold
▲ Page top
quest

very low end quest i think the reward is a few gold and maybe some decent faction. get em ident first cuz some are fools gold.
